curation_notes: Patch adds max:500 validation to password fields across 4 files: UserForgotPasswordController (update method), RegisterRequest, UserCreateRequest, and UserUpdateRequest (all rules methods). LoginRequest.php was identified as a sibling with the same missing max constraint on its password validation rule. Pre-assigned integer-overflow class confirmed — CWE-190 and advisory explicitly describe integer overflow from unbounded password length during hashing.
